items.title: Send revised heads of terms to Mercer Row landlord
items.detail: Email thread re: Unit 4 Mercer Row. Landlord's agent asked for the revised HoT 'by end of the week'. You said you'd turn it around Monday.
items.sourceRef: Re: Unit 4 Mercer Row — Heads of Terms

items.title: Site visit — Hadley Park development
items.detail: WhatsApp from Tom: 'Can you do the Hadley Park walkround Tuesday 10am? Bring the drainage plans.' You replied 👍.

appointment.location: Hadley Park, plot entrance off Mill Lane

items.title: Chase solicitor on Northgate completion date
items.detail: iMessage from Priya: 'Any word on Northgate completion? Client keeps asking.' No date agreed yet — needs you to push the solicitor.

items.title: Sort the thing with John
items.detail: WhatsApp from John: 'we still need to sort that thing out mate'. Ambiguous — no clear action or subject. Flagged for you to clarify or bin.

items.title: Action: circulate Q3 acquisition pipeline to partners
items.detail: From Monday's partner call (meeting notes). Owner: you. Agreed to send the updated pipeline deck before next week's call.

items.title: Lunch with Sarah — Friday 1pm, The Ivy
items.detail: Gmail from Sarah confirming lunch Friday 1pm at The Ivy. Personal. Appointment for the calendar.

items.title: Newsletter: 'Property Week digest'
items.detail: Marketing email. No action for you — included so you can confirm it's noise and bin it.
